title: Re-New
description: Modpack for easier sharing of slightly better vanilla
body: This modpack is designed for players who want to enjoy mods without feeling overwhelmed. Many modpacks either pack in hundreds of features that completely change the game or barely enhance vanilla at all. This one finds a comfortable middle ground — adding meaningful improvements, new mechanics, and a touch of freshness while keeping the overall vibe chill and approachable. It’s perfect for long-term worlds, whether you’re playing solo or with friends, offering something more exciting than vanilla without straying too far from what makes Minecraft feel familiar.
